summary: Plan-mode classification only. #76729 remains the live canonical issue for the Feishu/WebChat compaction successor transcript message-loss bug. #90641 is the linked candidate fix for the same root cause, but it is still an open draft PR with an unresolved automated Codex review finding, so no close or merge action is planned.

#90641 is the linked candidate fix for #76729, but it is not merge-ready in this plan job because it is draft and has an unresolved review-bot finding; keep it related to the canonical issue rather than closing or merging anything.
